designRules.unlock: Facility amenity incidents begin after the player graduates from the Garage chapter.
designRules.tone: Keep incidents age-appropriate, non-graphic, calm, and focused on protecting people and restoring service.
designRules.fairness: Teach the response before scoring it; never trigger during onboarding, a story scene, or an active machine safety sequence.
designRules.qualification: Only a worker whose role and station qualifications match the event may perform corrective work.

events.title: Restroom Service Interruption

responseSequence.instruction: Close the affected restroom and prevent use.
Post a clear OUT OF SERVICE sign and direct the team to another available restroom.
Have a qualified maintenance or facilities worker clear the blockage using appropriate PPE and procedure.
Clean and sanitize the affected area before inspection.
Inspect, document, and reopen only after normal operation is verified.

events.zachTeachingIntent: A good manufacturer maintains the whole workplace. Protect people first, assign qualified help, verify the result, and then restore availability.
